sections.paragraph: pl. f. (denom. from רֹאשׁ), pr. that which is at any one’s head, opp. to מַרְגְּלֹות that which is at the feet. It becomes a prep. at the head of any one, with suff. מְרַאֲשֹׁתָיו at his head, 1Sa 19:13 26:7 , 11 1Sa 26:11, 16 1Sa 26:16 1Ki 19:6 under his head, Gen 28:11, 18 Gen 28:18. It is followed by a noun in the gen. 1Sa 26:12, מֵרַאֲשֹׁותֵי שָׁאוּל “at the head of Saul,” perhaps for מִמְרַאֲשֹׁתֵי Mem being omitted (unless the true reading be מְרַאֲשֹׁותֵי), with a double plur. termination; see Hebr. Gramm. § 86, 4, note.
